featureName: BUG-015-003: Spec 015 declares SyncMode=api|hybrid but ships archive-only — no forward pointer to spec 056
planningOnlyJustification: Artifact-only extension-pointer fix: the API/hybrid implementation already exists under specs/056-twitter-api-connector/ (certified specs_hardened 2026-05-27) with code in internal/connector/twitter/api.go + api_test.go; this packet only back-propagates the forward pointer into spec 015's governance artifacts (state.json + spec.md + design.md). There is no separate implementation spec to link because the implementation already lives under spec 056. Per Gate G087 planning-only justification: no runtime code paths require a downstream implementation spec.

executionHistory.summary: Spec-review surfaced P1-3: specs/015-twitter-connector declares SyncMode=archive|api|hybrid and devotes an entire 'API Access Strategy' section to the hybrid strategy, but ships archive-only code (zero HTTP client, zero api.twitter.com/2/* calls). Spec 056-twitter-api-connector (certified specs_hardened on 2026-05-27) is the actual implementation of SyncModeAPI + SyncModeHybrid and explicitly names spec 015 as its predecessor — but spec 015 carries no reverse forward-pointer to spec 056 (state.json has no extendedBy/extensions[]/supersessions[] entry; spec.md and design.md carry no inline note). Code reality already matches the partition (archive in internal/connector/twitter/twitter.go; API in internal/connector/twitter/api.go) — this is artifact-only drift. Created 7-artifact bug folder (bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, scenario-manifest.json, state.json) at Phase 0.5.
